title: Teen Charged with Murder in Pageland Shooting
summary: A teenager surrendered to authorities, facing murder and weapon charges in connection with the fatal shooting of a 16-year-old in Pageland.
charlotte_impact: Highlights youth violence and the tragic loss of life, raising concerns about community safety and access to firearms.

title: One Dead in Indian Trail House Fire
summary: Officials are investigating a house fire in Indian Trail that resulted in one fatality. The fire occurred in the early morning hours of Easter Sunday.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the importance of fire safety and the potential dangers of residential fires, especially during holidays.

title: Man Charged with Attempted Murder After NoDa Home Attack
summary: Aleksandros Soutzos faces multiple charges, including attempted murder, after allegedly beating a man, setting his house on fire, and assaulting a woman in NoDa.
charlotte_impact: Details a violent domestic-related incident, raising concerns about domestic violence and community safety.

title: Rainy Easter Sunday Brings Relief to Drought Conditions
summary: Easter Sunday brought cooler temperatures and much-needed rain to the region, offering some relief amidst severe drought conditions.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the impact of weather on local conditions, specifically the drought and the relief brought by the rain.

title: Shooting in Southeast Charlotte Injures One
summary: One person was shot in southeast Charlotte on Pineburr Road, near Monroe Road. Medic confirmed the incident and transported the victim.
charlotte_impact: Reports another shooting incident, contributing to concerns about gun violence in the Charlotte area.

title: 17-Year-Old Missing from Matthews
summary: Jiselle Gonzalez, a 17-year-old, has been reported missing from Matthews. She was last seen on Matthews Township Parkway.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the vulnerability of missing teenagers and the importance of community awareness in locating them.

title: Woman Accused of Assaulting Officer with Car
summary: Tanaezah Austin, 25, was arrested for allegedly hitting a Charlotte-Mecklenburg police officer with her car, following a previous assault charge in April.
charlotte_impact: Details an incident involving assault on a police officer, raising concerns about public safety and respect for law enforcement.

title: Victim Identified in Rock Hill Interstate Crash
summary: The York County Coroner has identified the victim of a deadly interstate crash in Rock Hill as a 37-year-old Rock Hill woman.
charlotte_impact: Reports a fatal traffic accident, emphasizing the dangers of highway travel and the importance of road safety.

title: Infant Mortality Disparities Persist in Mecklenburg County
summary: Despite overall improvements, Mecklenburg County continues to face disparities in infant mortality rates, particularly affecting Black infants.
charlotte_impact: Addresses critical health disparities and the need for targeted interventions to improve infant health outcomes.

title: Two Injured in University City Rollover Crash
summary: Two people were injured in a rollover crash on University City Boulevard near the I-485 exit. The incident is under investigation.
charlotte_impact: Reports a traffic accident with injuries, highlighting the potential dangers of driving and the importance of safe driving practices.

title: Man Wanted for Firing into Crowded Kings Mountain Parking Lot
summary: Kings Mountain Police are searching for Ahmad Rashad Leggett Jr., who faces attempted murder charges after allegedly firing shots in a crowded gas station parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Details a reckless act of violence in a public space, raising concerns about gun violence and public safety.

title: Man Airlifted After Kershaw Shooting; Investigation Ongoing
summary: A man was airlifted to a hospital after being shot outside a home in Kershaw, Lancaster County. The sheriff's office is investigating.
charlotte_impact: Reports a serious shooting incident, emphasizing the potential for severe injuries and the ongoing investigation.

title: Police Investigate Deadly Crash in West Charlotte
summary: Police are investigating a deadly crash on Yorkmont Road in west Charlotte. Details are still unfolding as the investigation continues.
charlotte_impact: Reports a fatal traffic accident, highlighting the potential dangers on the roads and the ongoing investigation.

title: Pedestrian Hospitalized After Being Hit by Vehicle
summary: A pedestrian was hospitalized after being hit by a vehicle on Albemarle Road at Hollirose Drive Friday before 8 p.m.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the vulnerability of pedestrians and the importance of driver awareness and pedestrian safety.

title: Pedestrian Killed in Southeast Charlotte Vehicle Crash
summary: A pedestrian was struck and killed by a vehicle near the 7700 block of Krefeld Drive in southeast Charlotte overnight.
charlotte_impact: Reports a fatal pedestrian accident, emphasizing the dangers for pedestrians and the need for increased safety measures.
